title: [hwarith] lower to hw cast from `sv.read_inout`
body:
```mlir
hw.module @foo () -> () {
  %r52 = sv.wire  : !hw.inout<ui2>
  %0 = sv.read_inout %r52 : !hw.inout<ui2>
  %33 = hwarith.cast %0 : (ui2) -> i2
  %34 = hwarith.cast %0 : (ui2) -> i2
  %35 = comb.icmp eq %34, %33 : i2

  %c0_ui2 = hwarith.constant 2 : ui2
  sv.assign %r52, %c0_ui2 : ui2
}
```

```
$ circt-opt test.mlir --lower-hwarith-to-hw
test.mlir:6:9: error: null operand found
  %35 = comb.icmp eq %34, %33 : i2
        ^
test.mlir:6:9: note: see current operation: %2 = "comb.icmp"(<<NULL VALUE>>, <<NULL VALUE>>) {predicate = 0 : i64} : (<<NULL TYPE>>, <<NULL TYPE>>) -> i1
```
